'''鈭歵h-dh-y-g''' ('''kathadhyegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lux|lux]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lux|lux]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-dh-y-g
|-
! Lemma
| kathadhyegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithadhyegoko|thithadhyegoko]] || [[word:jithadhyegoko|jithadhyegoko]] || [[word:shithadhyegoko|shithadhyegoko]] || [[word:kithadhyegoko|kithadhyegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthadhyegoko|thuthuthadhyegoko]] || [[word:jujuthadhyegoko|jujuthadhyegoko]] || [[word:shushuthadhyegoko|shushuthadhyegoko]] || [[word:kukuthadhyegoko|kukuthadhyegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthadhyegoko|thuthadhyegoko]] || [[word:juthadhyegoko|juthadhyegoko]] || [[word:shuthadhyegoko|shuthadhyegoko]] || [[word:kuthadhyegoko|kuthadhyegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthadhyegoko|thuthadhyegoko]] || [[word:juthadhyegoko|juthadhyegoko]] || [[word:shuthadhyegoko|shuthadhyegoko]] || [[word:kuthadhyegoko|kuthadhyegoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothadhyegoko|thothadhyegoko]] || [[word:jothadhyegoko|jothadhyegoko]] || [[word:shothadhyegoko|shothadhyegoko]] || [[word:kothadhyegoko|kothadhyegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothadhyegoko|thothadhyegoko]] || [[word:jothadhyegoko|jothadhyegoko]] || [[word:shothadhyegoko|shothadhyegoko]] || [[word:kothadhyegoko|kothadhyegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thadhyegoko|th忙thadhyegoko]] || [[word:j忙thadhyegoko|j忙thadhyegoko]] || [[word:sh忙thadhyegoko|sh忙thadhyegoko]] || [[word:k忙thadhyegoko|k忙thadhyegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathadhyegoko|thathathadhyegoko]] || [[word:jajathadhyegoko|jajathadhyegoko]] || [[word:shashathadhyegoko|shashathadhyegoko]] || [[word:kakathadhyegoko|kakathadhyegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathadhyegoko|thathadhyegoko]] || [[word:jathadhyegoko|jathadhyegoko]] || [[word:shathadhyegoko|shathadhyegoko]] || [[word:kathadhyegoko|kathadhyegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathadhyegoko|thathadhyegoko]] || [[word:jathadhyegoko|jathadhyegoko]] || [[word:shathadhyegoko|shathadhyegoko]] || [[word:kathadhyegoko|kathadhyegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
